dos: Use `Text Primary` (#333333) for all main content and headings.
Apply `Card Frost` (#f7f7f9) as the default background for content cards, reserving `Canvas White` (#ffffff) for the page background.
Utilize `32px` border-radius for main content cards and larger organizational blocks.
Employ `Outline Blue` (#1685c7) for borders of interactive elements when a filled background is not desired.
Ensure generous `32px` padding within all `Default Content Card` elements.
Differentiate interactive elements using `Interactive Violet` (#6366f1) for borders on focus or active states.
Maintain a clear visual hierarchy by limiting prominent box shadows to `Layered Detail Card` elements, and keep them subtle.
donts: Do not use highly saturated colors for large background areas; maintain the overall achromatic canvas.
Avoid using multiple distinct colors for primary call-to-action buttons; the system emphasizes outlined chromatic actions.
Do not use generic border-radii; adhere to the specified `32px` for cards, `230px` for pill buttons, and `8px` for inputs.
Avoid deep, dark shadows; elevation is achieved through subtle, light box-shadows or subtle colored tints.
Do not use large, decorative imagery; product screenshots and UI examples should be contained within cards.
Refrain from drastically altering default typography letter-spacing for body text; rely on the defined values for each font family.
Do not introduce new border styles; primarily use 1-4px solid borders with neutral or accent colors.

colors.name: Canvas White
colors.role: Page backgrounds, card base layer, foundational surface

colors.name: Card Frost
colors.role: Default card backgrounds, subtle surface distinction from the main canvas

colors.name: Whisper Gray
colors.role: Subtle background for UI elements, light active states

colors.name: Cloud Tint
colors.role: Light background for specific interactive cards or linked elements, a slight cool tint

colors.name: Warm Paper
colors.role: Background for information cards, providing a soft, accessible contrast to the standard frost

colors.name: Text Primary
colors.role: Primary text, headings, and crucial interface elements for high readability

colors.name: Text Secondary
colors.role: Secondary text, muted headlines, subtle labels

colors.name: Text Dim
colors.role: Tertiary text, helper text, and subtle interface labels, receding slightly from text secondary

colors.name: Divider Gray
colors.role: Muted UI surface for disabled controls, low-emphasis panels, and placeholder blocks. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Outline Blue
colors.role: Blue accent for outlined action borders, linked labels, and lightweight interactive emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Interactive Violet
colors.role: Outline for active/focused elements, interactive links, and highlights — signals engagement dynamically

colors.name: Gradient Sunset
colors.role: Supporting palette color for small decorative accents when the core palette needs contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Alarm Red
colors.role: Red wash for highlight backgrounds, decorative bands, and soft emphasis behind content. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

colors.name: Blush Shadow
colors.role: Red supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

designSystem.layout: The page uses a maximum width of 1400px but primarily feels constrained and organized, reminiscent of a desktop application. The hero section often features a centered headline over a subtle background. Content is arranged within distinct rectangular cards, leading to a grid-like or stacked flow with consistent vertical `24px` section gaps. Many sections feature side-by-side card arrangements, creating visual pairs. The overall density is compact but not crowded, with content clearly delineated by card boundaries and subtle shadows. Navigation is a simple top bar with pill-shaped ghost buttons.
designSystem.imagery: This site predominantly uses clean, contained product screenshots and carefully cropped UI examples, often within cards with rounded corners. Photography is minimal, focusing on atmospheric shots when present. Icons are primarily outlined or filled charcoal gray, with a consistent stroke weight, serving functional rather than decorative roles. The visual focus is on clarity and the presentation of work and tools, making the imagery explanatory and showcasing rather than atmospheric.

similar.why: Uses a white canvas, extensive use of cards, and a compact, functional typography to organize varied content.
Employs an achromatic palette with a singular vivid accent color (violet/blue), subtle card-based layouts, and precise typography.
Focuses on clean UI, high information density, and card-like structures for productivity, with minimal imagery.
Relies on a structured, card-based approach for showcasing work, utilizing subtle grays and distinct typography.

surfaces.name: Page Canvas
surfaces.purpose: Primary page background, expansive white space

surfaces.name: Content Frost
surfaces.purpose: Default background for main content cards and sections

surfaces.name: Interactive Tint
surfaces.purpose: Background for active or emphasized cards and interactive elements

surfaces.name: Elevated Shadow
surfaces.purpose: Background for visually distinct cards that appear slightly lifted, often with custom shadows

components.name: Pill Navigation Button
components.description: Ghost button with `Card Frost` background, `Text Primary` color, `230px` radius for a pill shape, and `12px` vertical, `24px` horizontal padding. No border unless active.

components.name: Outline Action Button
components.role: Secondary calls-to-action or subtle interactive elements.
components.description: Ghost button with `Outline Blue` border, `Text Primary` color, `56px` radius, and `10px` vertical, `16px` horizontal padding.

components.name: Default Content Card
components.description: Background `Card Frost`, `32px` border-radius, no box shadow, `32px` padding on all sides. Houses main text content and sub-components.

components.name: Layered Detail Card
components.role: Elevated information or interactive listings within larger content areas.
components.description: Background can be `Cloud Tint` or `Warm Paper`. `8px` border-radius, subtle shadow `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) 0px 1px 2px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1px 3px 0px`, and `8px` vertical padding with no horizontal padding.

components.name: Ghost Card
components.role: Purely structural grouping without visual adornment.
components.description: Transparent background, no border-radius, no shadow, no padding. Used for simple content wrapping.

components.name: Gradient Action Card
components.role: Prominent interactive elements or special offers.
components.description: Background `Gradient Sunset`, `32px` border-radius, `32px` padding. Contains inverted text for contrast.

components.name: Input Field
components.description: White background, `Divider Gray` 1px border. Focus state border turns into `Interactive Violet`.

components.name: Selected Link Badge
components.role: Indicates active or selected items in a list.
components.description: Background `Cloud Tint`, border `Interactive Violet`, `100px` radius for a pill shape, `6px` vertical, `10px` horizontal padding.

typography.role: Body text, card labels, and some section information. Its precise tracking supports dense information display without sacrificing clarity.
Headings and prominent links, its varied weights and tight letter spacing create a modern, impactful presence for key statements.
Detailed labels, metadata, and small print, its generous letter-spacing at smaller sizes ensures legibility of ancillary information.
Used for specific social media embeds and some stylized links, maintaining its distinct character.

designSystem.description: Macro.fyi presents a functional white-canvas aesthetic, emphasizing content organization within distinct, softly shadowed containers. The system balances readability with a dense information display, utilizing a largely achromatic palette punctuated by a sole vivid violet for actionable elements and subtle gradient accents for dynamic cards.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
### Quick Color Reference
- text: #333333
- background: #ffffff
- border: #cccccf
- accent: #6366f1
- primary action: #1685c7 (outlined action border)

### 3-5 Example Component Prompts
- Create a section divider: `1px solid #cccccf` border, `8px` vertical margin.
- Create an Outlined Primary Action: Transparent background, #1685c7 border and text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use it for the main CTA instead of a filled button.
- Design a gradient action button: `Gradient Sunset` background `linear-gradient(16deg, rgb(255, 77, 121), rgb(255, 128, 64) 85%)`, `32px` border-radius, `Canvas White` (#ffffff) text color (Graphik weight 500, 16px), with `16px` vertical and `32px` horizontal padding.
